name: plan_queue_new_specialist_while_busy
notes: Plan-queue-busy variation: while a win-back approval is pending, the owner asks for a COMPLETELY UNRELATED new task (connect Google Sheets). Unlike second_plan_queue_busy.json's same-ask duplicate, this checks the manager doesn't over-generalise 'busy' into blocking every new ask — an unrelated specialist lane should proceed independently of the pending campaign approval. DEPENDENCY: step 2 is meaningful regardless of whether step 1 actually armed a pending approval or fell to an honest insufficient-data reply, since step 2's own ask (connect Sheets) does not depend on step 1's outcome. Setup: `setup --onboarded --seed-lapsed-customers 8 --name convo-harness-<id>` then `script <tenant> plan_queue_new_specialist_while_busy.json`.

steps.message: set up a win-back campaign for my lapsed customers
steps.note: First ask — expected to delegate to Sales-Recovery and (likely) arm a pending approval.

steps.message: separately, can you also connect my Google Sheets for the accounts?
assert_not_contains: you already have a pending campaign, please wait
let's finish the campaign first before connecting anything
once the campaign is approved we can look at connecting
steps.note: An unrelated NEW specialist ask (integration) while a different task (win-back) is pending approval. Expect the manager to engage the connect ask on its own lane — not gate it behind the unrelated pending campaign.
